title: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls
display_title: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls
wikitext:
[]: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sun Aug 15, 2021 2:43 pm As we know, in the original NGE every Evangelion was formed from the genetic material of Adam, except Uni-01 which was born from Lilith. We also know that their cores host the souls of the pilot's mothers, while Rei is a mystery (Rei I?). But in this new continuity, we don't have any confirmation regarding their origins. Besides that, we now have Adams instead of one Adam. There are also some Evas like Mk. 04 that don't have a humanoid anatomy and there are some Evangelions that seem to be more special than the others like Mark. 06. And some reason Eva-13 does not present an AT-Field. I think that the only confirmations we got are Evangelion 13 which is "one of the surviving Adams" and the Opfer Type Evas (jointly with the ships) that are the Adams that guarded the gates of Hell (or their clones?). Regarding the souls, the only confirmation we got was Yui inside of Unit-01. The other ones don't seem to have any soul and the pilots seem to be able to pilot multiple Evas. Asuka could pilot Unit-02 and Unit-03, Mari could pilot Unit-02 and Unit-08, etc... Do you guys have any clue or theory about all of these mysteries?

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Sun Aug 15, 2021 2:54 pm To me, there are vague indications that the soul of Unit-02 is Original Asuka. And Kaworu is with her in Unit-13 at the End. What leaves me in doubt is how Mari managed to pilot Asuka's Eva and which soul her own Unit received.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Lacissal » Sun Aug 15, 2021 4:08 pm The main difference between NGE and Rebuild is that in NGE the Evas are really just Ersatz-Adam and a Substitute-Lilith. Eva is entirely a man made copy of the Seeds. Rebuild 'Eva' meanwhile is an archetypal/primordial/pre-existent entity and concept, like Adam Kadmon. In the Golgotha Object there's 'Eva Imaginary', something Dr Katsuragi theorized the existence of even before 2nd Impact and Instrumentality in Rebuild is a process transforming all Lilin into Evas, and the giant winged Eva like figure on the ground at Calvary base. But as for what actual, physical material or genetic information there was on Rebuild Earth that Eva's 00-Mark.06 could have been constructed from that we saw there's -the Key of Nebuchadnezzar -Lilith -Kaworu(s) in his coffin More vague we have whatever happened with the Adams between 2nd Impact and the construction of the 4 ships and the Vessels of the Adams/Opfer Evas.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Aug 16, 2021 5:10 am Mari piloting Unit 02 reminded me of Kaworu controlling Unit 02 in e24, and there's other parallels between Kaworu and Mari, but my thinking stops there because there's no good reason for Mari being able to pilot like there is for Kaworu, having control over what's essentially a similar Adam copy. Lacissal wrote: ... the Key of Nebuchadnezzar

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Mon Aug 16, 2021 8:03 am Raikyu wrote: Asuka could pilot Unit-02 and Unit-03, Mario could pilot Unit-02 and Unit-08, etc...

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Raikyu » Mon Aug 16, 2021 8:24 am DantesInferno wrote: "You must pilot the Eva, Mario; otherwise Princess Peach will have to do it!"

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 6:28 pm Raikyu wrote: But I think I get it now. In this continuity, everyone can pilot an EVA, but if a pilot's mother soul is present in the core, the synchronization ratio will be higher, which is useful for pilots without experience.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 6:50 pm pir2confusion wrote: I think we might be making a mistake thinking that the pilot's mother soul has any part in piloting an Eva. This was how things worked in the tv series which made a point how the other pilot candidates didn't have mothers. Here we have Gendo able to control an Eva while needing the soul of Asuka and Kaworu for piloting or causing an impact neither of which I would see have that kind of connection with Gendo. I still don't understand who or what Mari is but if they ever reveal her past that is probably a clue or solution as to exact requirements that lets all of them pilot an Eva. I would guess some kind of human/angel hybrid so it isn't literately any person and why no other pilots seem to have been selected between movie 2 and 3.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:03 pm Konja7 wrote: According to Yamashita, the "pilot" (it's like a dummy plug) of Eva-13 in 3.0+1.0 is Kaworu's souless body. So, Gendo seems to need that connection to control Eva-13.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:08 pm pir2confusion wrote: Do you mean bodyless soul? Kaworu in the show was the soul of the eva and now he doesn't have a body left.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:19 pm If the soul is gone then how did Kaworu and Asuka have souls inside of Eva-13 that Shinji was able to communicate with?

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:23 pm pir2confusion wrote: If the soul is gone then how did Kaworu and Asuka have souls inside of Eva-13 that Shinji was able to communicate with?

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:27 pm pir2confusion wrote: If the soul is gone then how did Kaworu and Asuka have souls inside of Eva-13 that Shinji was able to communicate with?

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:29 pm Konja7 wrote: pir2confusion#929458 wrote: If the soul is gone then how did Kaworu and Asuka have souls inside of Eva-13 that Shinji was able to communicate with?

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 7:35 pm pir2confusion wrote: I would imagine the whole soul being trapped is more important for making the eva move or maybe they just need to give out Kaworu hand mittens to let others pilot an Eva.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 8:01 pm Konja7 wrote: The soul of Kaworu being trapped should be essential. However, Gendo should need Kaworu's souless body ("Zombie Kaworu") to take control of the Eva-13 (at least, until Gendo fused with Eva-13).

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 8:35 pm pir2confusion wrote: So are you saying that Kaworu/Asuka is Gendo's mother or that right now we know Kaworu and Rei + their clones/dummyplugs can all pilot evas.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by pir2confusion » Wed Aug 18, 2021 8:43 pm Konja7 wrote: pir2confusion#929474 wrote: So are you saying that Kaworu/Asuka is Gendo's mother or that right now we know Kaworu and Rei + their clones/dummyplugs can all pilot evas.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by Registration2 » Wed Aug 18, 2021 8:44 pm Let me tell one thing: We don't even know what evangelion is in the movies. You get mark.04 that is an eva, but the arms apparently are not, since in the fuck all evas scenes they werent present, even the whole mark.4 family was, same with mark seven. what is the materials of an eva? we have no clue, the "armor" may not even be armor since it is like flesh, it can grow out of nothing, unlike the TV series which was a big steel plate. The souls of evas are totally irrelevant when we don't have a clue about what makes an eva an eva.

[]: Re: The origin of the Evangelions and their souls             Quote Post by aboose » Wed Aug 18, 2021 8:46 pm Registration2 wrote: Let me tell one thing: We don't even know what evangelion is in the movies. You get mark.04 that is an eva, but the arms apparently are not, since in the fuck all evas scenes they werent present, even the whole mark.4 family was, same with mark seven. what is the materials of an eva? we have no clue, the "armor" may not even be armor since it is like flesh, it can grow out of nothing, unlike the TV series which was a big steel plate. The souls of evas are totally irrelevant when we don't have a clue about what makes an eva an eva.

You get mark.04 that is an eva, but the arms apparently are not, since in the fuck all evas scenes they werent present, even the whole mark.4 family was, same with mark seven. what is the materials of an eva? we have no clue, the "armor" may not even be armor since it is like flesh, it can grow out of nothing, unlike the TV series which was a big steel plate. The souls of evas are totally irrelevant when we don't have a clue about what makes an eva an eva.
